ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Vita del Cavalier Gio. Battista Marino
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Descritta dal Cavaliere Francesco Ferrari. All`Illustrissimo Sig. Il Sig. Domenico Molino
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On p. 89-90 the author mentions Marino`s affiliation to Neapolitan Academies.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
